fixture.description: A mapper assigns a value the UI collects in seconds directly to a backend field documented in milliseconds, with no x1000 conversion — a silent 1000x scale bug.

must_not_flag: the interface declaration itself as a separate issue

grader.rubric: PASS only if the report's MAIN section (not the appendix) flags that toSessionConfig assigns a value measured in SECONDS (idleTimeoutSeconds) directly to idleTimeoutMs, a field documented in MILLISECONDS, without converting (missing a x1000 multiply) — i.e. a unit/scale mismatch producing a value 1000x too small. Severity IMPORTANT or CRITICAL, with a concrete fix (multiply by 1000). FAIL if that finding is missing, appendix-only, dropped, or if the report only makes unrelated style/typing comments.

expected_behavior: Bugs agent flags the seconds-to-milliseconds unit mismatch (no x1000 conversion)
Finding severity is IMPORTANT or CRITICAL
Finding cites src/settings/timeout-settings.ts and suggests multiplying by 1000
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag the SessionConfig interface as a separate issue
Does NOT invent unrelated CRITICAL findings
